title: AI 网关：LiteLLM, Portkey, Kong AI 网关, Bifrost

questions.question: What is the core role of an AI gateway in the lesson?
options: A process sitting between apps与model providers that consolidates routing, fallback, retries, rate limits, secret references, observability,与guardrails behind one API

questions.question: What scale ceiling does Kong's benchmark report for LiteLLM?
options: It breaks down around ~2000 RPS with 8 GB memory与cascading failures under sustained load

questions.question: Per the Kong benchmark on equivalent CPU, how much faster is Kong AI 网关 than Portkey与LiteLLM?
options: 228% faster than Portkey与859% faster than LiteLLM

questions.question: Which gateway does the lesson position with 20-40 ms latency overhead与guardrails / PII redaction / jailbreak detection focus?
What does the lesson say is the forcing function for self-hosted vs managed gateway decisions?
options: Whether the gateway is open source

questions.question: Which gateways stay within budget when the SLA is TTFT P99 < 100 ms?
options: Kong (~3-8 ms) or Cloudflare/Vercel edge gateways (~1-3 ms); Portkey at 20-40 ms is too heavy
